mapper.insert:
insert into account_api_key_group (platform_id, account_id, username, platform_type, remote_key_id, key_name, key_status, group_name, current_rate, actual_rate, today_actual_cost, total_actual_cost, used_amount, remain_amount, collect_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.platformId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.username}, #{item.platformType}, #{item.remoteKeyId}, #{item.keyName}, #{item.keyStatus}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.currentRate}, #{item.actualRate}, #{item.todayActualCost}, #{item.totalActualCost}, #{item.usedAmount}, #{item.remainAmount}, #{item.collectTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
on conflict (platform_id, account_id, remote_key_id) do update set username = excluded.username, platform_type = excluded.platform_type, key_name = excluded.key_name, key_status = excluded.key_status, group_name = excluded.group_name, current_rate = excluded.current_rate, actual_rate = excluded.actual_rate, today_actual_cost = excluded.today_actual_cost, total_actual_cost = excluded.total_actual_cost, used_amount = excluded.used_amount, remain_amount = excluded.remain_amount, collect_time = excluded.collect_time, update_time = excluded.update_time
